title: asplenium parvifolium
intro: Asplenium parvifolium, also known as the Button Fern, is a small, terrestrial fern species native to tropical Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Asplenium parvifolium include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Asplenium parvifolium typically involve drying the plant's fronds, which can then be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
